jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Jaypee Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jaypee Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Jaypee Hospital:
Jaypee Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital!
